arts.ttl: Liverpool contract update: Why fans should not panic about Virgil van Dijk summer exit to Barcelona
arts.sum: Liverpool centre-back Virgil van Dijk is out of contract in the summer and could leave to join Barcelona for free, but his preference is to stay at Anfield.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Nike to Release Barcelona Long Sleeve Remake Kit
arts.sum: Footy Headlines can exclusively reveal that Nike is planning to release a special long-sleeve remake kit for FC Barcelona in late 2025.

arts.ttl: De Jong sends warning to Barca after win over Rayo
arts.sum: De Jong is thrilled with the situation but says it’s not time to start celebrating just yet and called on his team to improve. Frenkie de Jong says it’s good to be top of the table again in Spain but knows there’s still a long way to go in the title race.

arts.ttl: Flick gives his verdict on Barca’s narrow win over Rayo
arts.sum: Hansi Flick was a happy man after seeing his Barcelona team beat Rayo Vallecano 1-0 to move top of the table in Spain . “They have gone nine games without losing and I think today was a great success for us.

arts.ttl: Barca are back on top but must improve if they want to be champions
arts.sum: And this win gave Barcelona the three points they needed to match Real Madrid at the top of the table, and rise to first place on the head to head tiebreaker. Barcelona did not play like a team that wanted to win La Liga.

arts.ttl: ‘They are the only ones who go out onto the pitch with no-one supporting them’ – Rayo Vallecano manager Íñigo Pérez on La Liga refereeing
arts.sum: Barcelona took on Rayo Vallecano on Monday evening at Montjüic, and played out a 1-0 win against the side from Madrid, which put them top of the table. Following the…

arts.ttl: Barcelona edge Rayo to move top of LaLiga
arts.sum: Striker Robert Lewandowski scored a first-half penalty to give Barcelona a hard-fought 1-0 home win over Rayo Vallecano on Monday that moved them to top of the LaLiga standings.

arts.ttl: Balde: Barca did an ‘incredible job’ against Rayo
arts.sum: Barcelona defender Alejandro Balde felt his side did an “incredible job” in beating Rayo Vallecano 1-0 in La Liga on Monday night . The defender is a happy man

arts.ttl: Barcelona 1-0 Rayo Vallecano: Player Ratings as Barca Overtake Real Madrid as La Liga Leaders
arts.sum: Barcelona took advantage of Real Madrid and Atlético Madrid dropping points to defeat Rayo Vallecano and go top of La Liga.

arts.ttl: One Barcelona attacker has not scored a league goal in nearly 4 months
arts.sum: A surprise statistic surrounding the production of Barcelona star Lamine Yamal in league play of late has come to the fore online. Wide-man Lamine was of course afforded his latest…
